STRUCTURE.md — ggpop

Source: STRUCTURE.md

Links

  • pkgdown: https://jurjoroa.github.io/ggpop/
  • GitHub: https://github.com/jurjoroa/ggpop

R/

File Purpose
geom_pop.R Main geom_pop() — delegates to helpers
geom_pop-helpers.R All helpers for geom_pop()
geom_icon_point.R Main geom_icon_point()
geom-icon-point-helpers.R All helpers for geom_icon_point()
geom-pop-image.R Draw-time recoloring geom (GeomPopImage) shared by both geoms
validators.R Shared validation functions
process_data.R process_data() standalone helper
scale_legend_icon.R scale_legend_icon()
theme-pop.R All theme_pop*() functions
fa-icons.R fa_icons() — search and list Font Awesome icons
icon-utils.R Icon rendering — PNG generation, caching
fetch_df_coordinates.R Coordinate system for geom_pop grid
draw_key.R Custom legend key drawing
globals.R utils::globalVariables declarations
ggpop-package.R Package-level documentation
zzz.R .onLoad / .onAttach hooks

Key Functions

Function File Exported
geom_pop() geom_pop.R yes
geom_icon_point() geom_icon_point.R yes
fa_icons() fa-icons.R yes
scale_legend_icon() scale_legend_icon.R yes
theme_pop*() theme-pop.R yes
process_data() process_data.R yes
validate_geom_pop_*() validators.R no
validate_geom_icon_point_*() validators.R no

Vignettes

File Purpose
fa-icons.qmd fa_icons() discovery guide
getting-started.Rmd Getting started guide
geom-icon-point.Rmd geom_icon_point() main guide
examples-geom-pop.Rmd geom_pop() examples
examples-geom-icon-point.Rmd geom_icon_point() examples
process-data.Rmd process_data() guide
themes-customization.Rmd Themes and customization

tests/testthat/

File Purpose
test-01_geom_pop-warnings.R geom_pop() warning tests
test-02_geom_pop-errors.R geom_pop() error tests
test-03_geom_pop-checkpass.R geom_pop() snapshot tests
test-04_geom_pop-cowplot.R geom_pop() cowplot integration
test-05_geom_icon_point-warnings.R geom_icon_point() warning tests
test-06_geom_icon_point-errors.R geom_icon_point() error tests
test-07_geom_icon_point-checkpass.R geom_icon_point() snapshot tests
test-08_process_data.R process_data() tests
test-09_helper-functions.R Helper function tests
test-10_scale_legend_icon.R scale_legend_icon() tests
test-11_fa_icons.R fa_icons() tests

memory/

File Purpose
memory/RELEASE.md NEWS.md template + release rules + gh commands
